input.raw_text: We may sell, rent, or otherwise transfer your personal information, including your name, email address, browsing history, and location data, to third-party advertisers and data brokers at our sole discretion. By using this service you waive your right to participate in any class action lawsuit against us. All disputes must be resolved through binding individual arbitration. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time without notice. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the new terms. We retain your data indefinitely even after account deletion.
input.title: EvilCorp Terms of Service

input.raw_text: We collect cookies and similar tracking technologies to analyze your usage patterns and improve our service. This data may be shared with analytics partners such as Google Analytics and Mixpanel. We may use your email address to send you promotional communications; you can opt out at any time. We store your data for up to 3 years after your last login. We may update these terms with 30 days notice sent to your registered email. You can request deletion of your account data by contacting support.
input.title: MediumRisk App Privacy Policy

input.raw_text: We collect only the minimum data necessary to provide our service: your email address and username. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with any third parties. We use industry-standard encryption (AES-256) to protect your data at rest and in transit. You can export or permanently delete all your data at any time from your account settings. We will notify you at least 60 days in advance of any changes to this policy. We retain your data only for the duration of your account and delete it within 30 days of account closure.
input.title: PrivacyFirst App Privacy Policy

title: Mixed-risk ToS with unilateral change clause

input.raw_text: We collect your IP address, device identifiers, and usage data to improve our services. Your content may be used to train our AI models; you can opt out by contacting support. We will not sell your personal data to third parties. We may change these terms at any time without prior notice; your continued use indicates agreement. Disputes are subject to the laws of the State of Delaware. We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information.
input.title: AI Startup Terms of Service

must_flag.topic: content used to train AI models

title: Cookies-only analytics policy — should be GREEN

input.raw_text: We use cookies and similar technologies to operate our website and improve your experience. These cookies help us understand how you navigate our site so we can make it better. We do not sell your data to any third parties. You can control cookie settings through your browser at any time. We use Google Analytics to understand aggregate usage patterns — this data is anonymized and cannot identify you personally. We store your data only for as long as your account is active and delete it within 30 days of account closure.
input.title: Simple Analytics Privacy Policy

title: 30-day notice change clause — should be GREEN

input.raw_text: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by email and by posting a notice on our website at least 30 days before the changes take effect. Your continued use of the service after the effective date constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms. We collect your name and email address to provide the service. We do not share your personal information with third parties except as required by law. You can request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time.
input.title: Fair Notice Terms of Service
